engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is deciding whether to trust a board-certified physician and her interdisciplinary practice with a long-term medical program; the page sells defined medical expertise, credentials, process and patient testimonials, which is the first rung of the ladder.

goal.one_action: book a free consultation with Dr. Abby (or otherwise contact the clinic)

structure.archetype_note: Squarespace multi-page trust/lead-gen site for a medical practice: approach + program detail + testimonials + contact/booking. /cart plugin present but no commerce in use.

mapped.observed_as: top nav (Our Approach, Programs, Testimonials, Contact...)
Freedom to live the life you want.
A Different Approach to Weight Loss
Ready to start your journey back to living a life you love?
patient outcomes: energy, vitality, activity, emotional well-being
client base: older adults, younger adults, injury recovery
Contact Us form (First/Last Name, Email, Subject, Message)

unmapped.observed: embedded Google Map on contact page
unmapped.why_no_fit: map is a component within map-hours capability; no canonical section id for a standalone location map

confidence.why: Rendered fetch confirmed the contact form and map that static missed; nav, CTAs, embeds and proof all captured clearly.

gap_findings: Site mixes multiple conversion mechanisms for one goal (Calendly booking embed + contact form + mailto CTAs) — no single clean mechanism; taxonomy forces one pick.
A standalone embedded location map has no canonical section id (only the map-hours capability), so it lands in unmapped.
